calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Serina Elnora Lafleur-Peilom, Plaintiff/Respondent, appears as Propria Persona.
Counsel Emmanuel Enyinwa, Esq., Specially Appearance for Defendant/Appellant Yony Recinos Mejia DBA A-1 Shoe Repair who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Ms. Lafleur-Peilom, Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - pictures of chairs #1 & #2.

Mr. Enyinwa testifies on behalf of Defendant/Appellant and Mr. Mejia also testifies on his own behalf. The Following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - pictures of chair #2.
Exhibits (1)- declaration of Mr. Mejia

Mr. Mejia responds to questions from the Court.

Closing argument presented by Ms. Lafleur-Peilom.
Closing argument presented by Counsel Mr. Enyinwa.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Unmarked exhibits for plaintiff are returned. Appellant's exhibits are retained by the Court.

Judge Pro tem David H. Fleisig, Clerk Jean Kong, Not Reported (D525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Judgment Entered
